title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Mounting A Comeback
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins Deal to Support Trident II Missile
text: General Dynamics (GD) is going to provide support to SSBN Fire Control System and SSGN Attack Weapon Control System for Trident II (D-5) missile.

title: Why General Dynamics Is The Right Defensive Dividend Growth Stock
text: General Dynamics is growing its top and bottom lines and has a record backlog. Management has aggressively paid down debt over the past year in a rising rate environment.

title: General Dynamics' (GD) Arm Wins Deal to Support Abrams Tank
text: General Dynamics (GD) is going to offer technical support for Abrams Tank.

title: The 7 Best Defense Stocks to Buy for Our Dangerous World
text: The best defense stocks may have a banner year ahead. Last year, Russia's invasion of Ukraine began.

title: DivHut Portfolio Update: February 2023
text: The system is clearly broken and has been for a while; however, I could find comfort in one thing, my dividends. These days, there are no shortages of accidental high yielding stocks but look at real cash on hand when viewing balance sheets.

title: Bert's February 2023 Dividend Income Summary
text: We received $826.12 in February dividend income. Unfortunately, my dividend income decreased 5.45% this month compared to last year. The main reason our dividend is down this year compared to last year is due predominantly to the AT&T dividend cut.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Announces a Hike of 4.8% in Dividend
text: General Dynamics (GD) raises the quarterly dividend to $1.32 per share, reflecting a rise of 4.8% from the previous payout.

title: General Dynamics hikes dividend by nearly 5%
text: General Dynamics Corp. GD, -1.93% said Wednesday its board hiked the company's dividend by nearly 5%. The defense contractor said it will pay out a quarterly dividend of $1.32 a share on May 12 to shareholders of record as of April 14, up from its previous quarterly dividend of $1.26 a share.

title: 3 Reasons to Sell Your Defense Stocks Now
text: Bloomberg Published an article in February that discussed the failings of the U.S. Military. If you read it, you may immediately want to sell any defense stocks you own.

title: Dividend Income Summary: Lanny's February 2023 Summary
text: Investing in dividend stocks allows you to earn dividend income, the best passive income stream. As I stated in my December 2022 post, 2022 finished off down, ending up below 3,900! The market was down 20% for 2022.
